_meta.source: G-NAF (Geocoded National Address File) — Geoscape Australia, MAY 2026 release
_meta.attribution: Incorporates or developed using G-NAF © Geoscape Australia licensed by the Commonwealth of Australia under CC BY 4.0.
_meta.scope: City of Vincent, WA — representative sample (3 rows). Full extract: ~18,000–22,000 active address points.
_meta.extraction_method: SQL filter on ADDRESS_DETAIL + ADDRESS_DEFAULT_GEOCODE PSV tables via locality_name IN (...) — see docs/DATA_ACQUISITION_RUNBOOK.md Section 2.1 Option A
_meta.note: gnaf_pid values use GAWA_ prefix (WA addresses). Coordinates are 8-decimal-place GDA2020. These rows are representative of real G-NAF structure; actual PID values and exact coordinates will differ in the full extract.

records.address: 45 Scarborough Beach Road, Mount Hawthorn WA 6016
